scripts.text:
IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#T_Customer') IS NOT NULL
    DROP TABLE #T_Customer;



Select Distinct  C.CustomerID,
	Ltrim(Rtrim(Firstname)) as FirstName, 
	Ltrim(Rtrim(Lastname))  as LastName,
	Concat(Ltrim(Rtrim(Firstname)),' ',Ltrim(Rtrim(Lastname))) as Fullname,
	Address1,Address2,City,State, 
	Ltrim(Rtrim(Zip))   as ZIp, 
	Ltrim(Rtrim(Phone)) as Phone,
	Email,
	C.Division,
	LP_DateAdded
	into #T_Customer
	from 
	EDW.Dim_customer C
	where 
		  Firstname is not null and lastName is not null 
		  and Firstname !='' and lastName !='' 
		  and Firstname !='-' and lastName !='-'
		  and Firstname not like '%--%' and lastName  not like '%--%'
		  and Lower(Firstname) not in ('na','private','unknown','lead','mrs.','called in hung up ','working','first','test','Lucian')
		  and lower(lastName)  not in ('na','caller','unknown','lead','mrs.','working-tv','last','test','TEST5','test coat','test 3','Test 2','Test1','Cernauteanu')
		  
		  and Phone is not null and phone not in ('',' ','1111111','#ERROR!','+','0000000','000000000','0000000000')
		  
		  and Email IS NOT NULL AND Email LIKE '%@%'  
		  AND Email NOT IN (
						'', 
						'test@test.com'					, 
						'test@gmail.com'				,
						'test@fb.com'					,
						'N@A.COM'						,
						'NA@NA.COM'						,
						'NO.HOMEDEPOT@GMAIL.COM'		,
						'noemail@noemail.com'			,
						'non@yahoo.com'					,
						'none@none.com'					,
						'NA@NA'							,
						'noemail@noemail.com.prod'		,
						'noemail@yahoo.com'				,
						'no@gmail.com'                  ,
						'NO_EMAIL@GMAIL.COM'            ,
						'NO_EMAIL@HOMEDEPOT.COM'        ,
						'NO_MAIL@NOMAIL.COM'            ,
						'noaddress123@yahoo.com'        ,
						'noemail@email.com.prod'        ,
						'noemail@gmail.com'             ,
						'NO-EMAIL@GMAIL.COM'            ,
						'NOEMAIL@HOMEDEPOT.NET'         ,
						'Noemail@no.com'                ,
						'noemail@noemail.com'           ,
						'noemail@noemail.com.prod'      ,
						'NOEMAIL@NOMAIL.COM'            ,
						'NOEMAIL@YAHOO.CO'              ,
						'noemail@yahoo.com'             ,
						'nomoretermite@yahoo.com.prod'  ,
						'non@non.com'                   ,
						'non@non.com.prod'              ,
						'non@yahoo.com'                 ,
						'none@nomail.com'               ,
						'none@none'                     ,
						'none@none.com'                 ,
						'NOREPLY@YAHOO.COM'
						)	
	    
		and Zip is not null and Zip not in ('','0');
		
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------



IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#T_1') IS NOT NULL
    DROP TABLE #T_1;

IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#T_Unique_Customer_ByPhone') IS NOT NULL
   DROP TABLE #T_Unique_Customer_ByPhone;

	
Select * ,Concat('GID-',Row_number() over(order by LP_dateadded desc)) as MasterID 
into #T_Unique_Customer_ByPhone
from (
Select * , 
Row_number() over(partition by Fullname,Phone order by LP_dateadded desc ) as Rownumber 
from #T_Customer
)a where Rownumber=1;



Select  C.CustomerID,C.FirstName,C.LastName,C.Fullname,
	C.Address1,C.Address2,C.City,C.State,C.ZIp,C.Phone,C.Email,C.Division,C.LP_DateAdded
	,T.masterid as masterid_ByPhone --
into #T_1
from #T_Customer C  Join #T_Unique_Customer_ByPhone T
on C.Fullname =T.Fullname and C.Phone=T.Phone;

	

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#T_Unique_ByPhone') IS NOT NULL
    DROP TABLE #T_Unique_ByPhone;

	
IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#T_Unique_ByPhone_PerCustomer') IS NOT NULL
    DROP TABLE #T_Unique_ByPhone_PerCustomer;
	
Select t1.* 
into #T_Unique_ByPhone 
from #T_1 t1 join ( SELECT t.MasterID_byPhone FROM #T_1 t Group by t.MasterID_byPhone HAVING COUNT(t.CustomerID) > 1	) t2 
						on t1.Masterid_ByPhone = t2.Masterid_ByPhone;


Select t1.* 
into #T_Unique_ByPhone_PerCustomer
from #T_1 t1 join ( SELECT t.MasterID_byPhone FROM #T_1 t Group by t.MasterID_byPhone HAVING COUNT(t.CustomerID) = 1	) t2 
						on t1.Masterid_ByPhone = t2.Masterid_ByPhone;
 

			
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------


While exists (
				Select  Fullname,Phone,max(MasterID_ByPhone) as MasterID_ByPhone from  #T_Unique_ByPhone  Group by Fullname,Phone having count(distinct MasterID_ByPhone)>1
				UNION ALL 
				Select  Fullname,Email,max(MasterID_ByPhone) as MasterID_ByPhone  from  #T_Unique_ByPhone Group by Fullname,Email having count(distinct MasterID_ByPhone)>1
				UNION ALL
				Select  Fullname,Concat(Zip,' ',Address1) Address ,max(MasterID_ByPhone) as MasterID_ByPhone from  #T_Unique_ByPhone Where Address1 is not null  Group by Fullname,Concat(Zip,' ', Address1) having count(distinct MasterID_ByPhone)>1
			)
Begin

		Update #T_Unique_ByPhone set MasterID_ByPhone = t2.MasterID_ByPhone
				from #T_Unique_ByPhone t1  join 
							( Select  Fullname,Email,max(MasterID_ByPhone) as MasterID_ByPhone
							from  #T_Unique_ByPhone 
							-- Where Email='histoire963@gmail.com'
							Group by Fullname,Email having count(distinct MasterID_ByPhone)>1
							) t2 on t1.fullname=t2.fullname and t1.email=t2.email ;
							
	
			
		Update #T_Unique_ByPhone set MasterID_ByPhone = t2.MasterID_ByPhone
				from #T_Unique_ByPhone t1  join 
							(  Select  Fullname,Phone,max(MasterID_ByPhone) as MasterID_ByPhone
							from  #T_Unique_ByPhone 
							-- Where Email='trinilady02@yahoo.com'
							Group by Fullname,Phone having count(distinct MasterID_ByPhone)>1
							) t2 on t1.fullname=t2.fullname and t1.Phone=t2.Phone; 
		
		
		Update #T_Unique_ByPhone set MasterID_ByPhone = t2.MasterID_ByPhone
			from #T_Unique_ByPhone t1  join 
						(   Select  Fullname,Zip,Address1,max(MasterID_ByPhone) as MasterID_ByPhone
							from  #T_Unique_ByPhone 
							Where Address1 is not null 
							Group by Fullname,Zip,Address1 having count(distinct MasterID_ByPhone)>1
						) t2 on t1.fullname=t2.fullname and t1.Zip=t2.Zip and 
						--COALESCE(t1.Address1,'none')=COALESCE(t2.Address1,'none')
						substring(Ltrim(t1.Address1,'	'),1,charindex(' ',Ltrim(t1.Address1,'	')) ) = substring(Ltrim(t2.Address1,'	'),1,charindex(' ',Ltrim(t2.Address1,'	')) );
							
							
		
		
		
End

		


			
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------



While Exists ( Select Distinct T1.CustomerId, T2.MasterID_ByPhone
			   from #T_Unique_ByPhone_PerCustomer T1  join #T_Unique_ByPhone T2 
					on T1.Fullname=T2.FullName and  T1.Email = T2.Email 
			   Union All
			   Select Distinct T1.CustomerId, T2.MasterID_ByPhone
			   from #T_Unique_ByPhone_PerCustomer T1  join #T_Unique_ByPhone T2 
					on T1.Fullname=T2.FullName and  T1.Zip = T2.Zip and 
					Coalesce(substring(Ltrim(T1.Address1,'	'),1,charindex(' ',Ltrim(T1.Address1,'	')) ),'None')=Coalesce(substring(Ltrim(T2.Address1,'	'),1,charindex(' ',Ltrim(T2.Address1,'	')) ),'None')
						--( ( T1.Address1 is NULL or T2.Address1 is NULL ) 
						--or 
						--substring(Ltrim(T1.Address1,'	'),1,charindex(' ',Ltrim(T1.Address1,'	')) ) = substring(Ltrim(T2.Address1,'	'),1,charindex(' ',Ltrim(T2.Address1,'	')) )
						--)
			 )
		and 
	  Not exists (Select MasterID_ByPhone from #T_Unique_ByPhone_PerCustomer group by MasterID_bYPhone having count(Distinct CustomerID)>1)

Begin

		Insert into #T_Unique_ByPhone
		Select Distinct
			T1.CustomerId, T1.Firstname,T1.LastName,T1.Fullname,T1.Address1,T1.Address2,T1.City,T1.State,T1.Zip,T1.Phone,T1.Email,T1.Division,T1.Lp_DateAdded,
			max(T2.MasterID_byPhone) as MasterID_byPhone
			from #T_Unique_ByPhone_PerCustomer T1 Left join #T_Unique_ByPhone T2 
				on T1.Fullname=T2.FullName and  T1.Email = T2.Email 
			Where T2.CustomerId is not null 
			group by T1.CustomerId, T1.Firstname,T1.LastName,T1.Fullname,T1.Address1,T1.Address2,T1.City,T1.State,T1.Zip,T1.Phone,T1.Email,T1.Division,T1.Lp_DateAdded
			;
						
		
		DELETE T1
		FROM #T_Unique_ByPhone_PerCustomer T1
		LEFT JOIN #T_Unique_ByPhone T2
			ON T1.CustomerID = T2.CustomerID 
		WHERE T2.CustomerId IS NOT NULL ;
		
		
		Insert into #T_Unique_ByPhone
		Select Distinct
			T1.CustomerId, T1.Firstname,T1.LastName,T1.Fullname,T1.Address1,T1.Address2,T1.City,T1.State,T1.Zip,T1.Phone,T1.Email,T1.Division,T1.Lp_DateAdded,
			Max(T2.MasterID_byPhone) as MasterID_byPhone
			from #T_Unique_ByPhone_PerCustomer T1 Left join #T_Unique_ByPhone T2 
				on T1.Fullname=T2.FullName and  T1.Zip = T2.Zip 
			Where T2.CustomerId is not null and 
			Coalesce(substring(Ltrim(T1.Address1,'	'),1,charindex(' ',Ltrim(T1.Address1,'	')) ),'None')=Coalesce(substring(Ltrim(T2.Address1,'	'),1,charindex(' ',Ltrim(T2.Address1,'	')) ),'None')
					--( ( T1.Address1 is NULL or T2.Address1 is NULL ) 
					--	or 
					--	substring(Ltrim(T1.Address1,'	'),1,charindex(' ',Ltrim(T1.Address1,'	')) ) = substring(Ltrim(T2.Address1,'	'),1,charindex(' ',Ltrim(T2.Address1,'	')) )
					--)
			Group by T1.CustomerId, T1.Firstname,T1.LastName,T1.Fullname,T1.Address1,T1.Address2,T1.City,T1.State,T1.Zip,T1.Phone,T1.Email,T1.Division,T1.Lp_DateAdded
			;
						
		DELETE T1
		FROM #T_Unique_ByPhone_PerCustomer T1
		LEFT JOIN #T_Unique_ByPhone T2
			ON T1.CustomerID = T2.CustomerID 
		WHERE T2.CustomerId IS NOT NULL ;
		
		
End 





			
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------




IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#T_2') IS NOT NULL
    DROP TABLE #T_2;

	
IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#T_Unique_Customer_ByEmail') IS NOT NULL
    DROP TABLE #T_Unique_Customer_ByEmail;
	

Select * ,Concat('GID-',Row_number() over(order by LP_dateadded)) as MasterID  
into #T_Unique_Customer_ByEmail
from 
	(
		Select  C.* ,ROW_NUMBER() OVER( PARTITION BY C.FullName,C.Email ORDER BY C.LP_DateAdded DESC ) AS Rownumber 
						FROM #T_Customer C
						LEFT JOIN  #T_Unique_ByPhone_PerCustomer T1  ON  C.CustomerID = T1.CustomerID
						WHERE 
						 	T1.Masterid_ByPhone IS NOT NULL
							
	)a  
	where Rownumber=1;


Select C.CustomerID,C.FirstName,C.LastName,C. Fullname,
	 C.Address1,C.Address2,C.City,C.State,C.ZIp,C.Phone,C.Email,C.Division,C.LP_DateAdded, T.masterid as Masterid_ByEmail 
into #T_2
from #T_Customer C  Join #T_Unique_Customer_ByEmail T
		on C.Fullname =T.Fullname and C.Email=T.Email; 

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
	
	
IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#T_Unique_ByEmail') IS NOT NULL
    DROP TABLE #T_Unique_ByEmail;

	
IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#T_Unique_ByEmail_PerCustomer') IS NOT NULL
    DROP TABLE #T_Unique_ByEmail_PerCustomer;
	
Select t1.* 
into #T_Unique_ByEmail 
from #T_2 t1 join ( SELECT t.MasterID_byEmail FROM #T_2 t Group by t.MasterID_byEmail HAVING COUNT(t.CustomerID) > 1	) t2 
						on t1.MasterID_byEmail = t2.MasterID_byEmail;


Select t1.* 
into #T_Unique_ByEmail_PerCustomer
from #T_2 t1 join ( SELECT t.MasterID_byEmail FROM #T_2 t Group by t.MasterID_byEmail HAVING COUNT(t.CustomerID) = 1	) t2 
						on t1.MasterID_byEmail = t2.MasterID_byEmail;
 		

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------



While exists (	
				Select  Fullname,Phone,max(MasterID_ByPhone) as MasterID_ByPhone from  #T_Unique_ByPhone  Group by Fullname,Phone having count(distinct MasterID_ByPhone)>1
				UNION ALL
				Select  Fullname,Email,max(MasterID_byEmail) as MasterID_byEmail  from  #T_Unique_ByEmail Group by Fullname,Email having count(distinct MasterID_byEmail)>1
				UNION ALL
				Select  Fullname,Concat(Zip,' ',Address1) Address ,max(MasterID_byEmail) as MasterID_byEmail from  #T_Unique_ByEmail Where Address1 is not null  Group by Fullname,Concat(Zip,' ', Address1) having count(distinct MasterID_byEmail)>1
			 )
			
Begin	
			
	Update #T_Unique_ByEmail set MasterID_ByEmail = t2.MasterID_ByEmail
		from #T_Unique_ByEmail t1  join 
					(   Select fullname, Zip,Address1,max(MasterID_ByEmail) as MasterID_ByEmail
						from #T_Unique_ByEmail
						where Address1 is not null
						group by fullname, Zip,Address1 having count(distinct MasterID_byEmail)>1
					) t2 on t1.fullname=t2.fullname and t1.Zip=t2.Zip and 
					--COALESCE(t1.Address1,'none')=COALESCE(t2.Address1,'none')
					substring(Ltrim(t1.Address1,'	'),1,charindex(' ',Ltrim(t1.Address1,'	')) ) = substring(Ltrim(t2.Address1,'	'),1,charindex(' ',Ltrim(t2.Address1,'	')) );
	
	
	Update #T_Unique_ByEmail set MasterID_ByEmail = t2.MasterID_ByEmail
		from #T_Unique_ByEmail t1  join 
					(  Select  Fullname,Phone,max(MasterID_ByEmail) as MasterID_ByEmail
					from  #T_Unique_ByEmail 
					-- Where Email='trinilady02@yahoo.com'
					Group by Fullname,Phone having count(distinct MasterID_ByEmail)>1
					) t2 on t1.fullname=t2.fullname and t1.Phone=t2.Phone; 
							
							
	Update #T_Unique_ByEmail set MasterID_ByEmail = t2.MasterID_ByEmail
			from #T_Unique_ByEmail t1  join 
						(  Select  Fullname,Email,max(MasterID_ByEmail) as MasterID_ByEmail
						from  #T_Unique_ByEmail 
						-- Where Email='trinilady02@yahoo.com'
						Group by Fullname,Email having count(distinct MasterID_ByEmail)>1
						) t2 on t1.fullname=t2.fullname and t1.Email=t2.Email;


End


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
	

Insert into #T_Unique_ByEmail
Select Distinct
	T1.CustomerId, T1.Firstname,T1.LastName,T1.Fullname,T1.Address1,T1.Address2,T1.City,T1.State,T1.Zip,T1.Phone,T1.Email,T1.Division,T1.Lp_DateAdded,
	Max(T2.MasterID_byEmail) as MasterID_byEmail
	from #T_Unique_ByEmail_PerCustomer T1 Left join #T_Unique_ByEmail T2 
		on T1.Fullname=T2.FullName and  T1.Zip = T2.Zip 
	Where T2.CustomerId is not null and
	Coalesce(substring(Ltrim(T1.Address1,'	'),1,charindex(' ',Ltrim(T1.Address1,'	')) ),'None')=Coalesce(substring(Ltrim(T2.Address1,'	'),1,charindex(' ',Ltrim(T2.Address1,'	')) ),'None')
			--( ( T1.Address1 is NULL or T2.Address1 is NULL ) 
			--			or 
			--			substring(Ltrim(T1.Address1,'	'),1,charindex(' ',Ltrim(T1.Address1,'	')) ) = substring(Ltrim(T2.Address1,'	'),1,charindex(' ',Ltrim(T2.Address1,'	')) )
			--) 
	Group by T1.CustomerId, T1.Firstname,T1.LastName,T1.Fullname,T1.Address1,T1.Address2,T1.City,T1.State,T1.Zip,T1.Phone,T1.Email,T1.Division,T1.Lp_DateAdded
	;
			    

DELETE T1
FROM #T_Unique_ByEmail_PerCustomer T1
LEFT JOIN #T_Unique_ByEmail T2
    ON T1.CustomerID = T2.CustomerID 
WHERE T2.CustomerId IS NOT NULL ;

 

	
	
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
		

		

IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#T_3') IS NOT NULL
    DROP TABLE #T_3;

	
IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#T_Unique_Customer_ByZip') IS NOT NULL
    DROP TABLE #T_Unique_Customer_ByZip;
	


Select * ,Concat('GID-',Row_number() over(order by LP_dateadded)) as MasterID  
into #T_Unique_Customer_ByZip
from 
	(
		Select  C.* ,ROW_NUMBER() OVER( PARTITION BY C.FullName,C.Zip,substring(Ltrim(C.Address1,'	'),1,charindex(' ',Ltrim(C.Address1,'	')) )
											ORDER BY C.LP_DateAdded DESC ) AS Rownumber 
						FROM #T_Customer C
						LEFT JOIN  #T_Unique_ByEmail_PerCustomer T1  ON  C.CustomerID = T1.CustomerID
						WHERE 
						 	T1.Masterid_ByEmail IS NOT NULL 							
	)a  
	where Rownumber=1;
	
	
Select C.CustomerID,C.FirstName,C.LastName,C. Fullname,
	 C.Address1,C.Address2,C.City,C.State,C.ZIp,C.Phone,C.Email,C.Division,C.LP_DateAdded, T.masterid as Masterid_ByZip 
into #T_3
from #T_Customer C  Join #T_Unique_Customer_ByZip T
		on C.Fullname =T.Fullname and C.Zip=T.Zip   
	Where	--( --( C.Address1 is NULL And T.Address1 is NULL ) 
			Coalesce(substring(Ltrim(C.Address1,'	'),1,charindex(' ',Ltrim(C.Address1,'	')) ),'None')=Coalesce(substring(Ltrim(T.Address1,'	'),1,charindex(' ',Ltrim(T.Address1,'	')) ),'None')
									
			--)
			; 
			
		

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------


	
IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#T_Unique_ByPhone_Final') IS NOT NULL
   DROP TABLE #T_Unique_ByPhone_Final;
	
Select * , Dense_rank() over(order by MasterID_ByPhone ) as MasterID 
into #T_Unique_ByPhone_Final
from #T_Unique_ByPhone ;



Declare @Rownumber Int;
Select @Rownumber= max(MasterID) from #T_Unique_ByPhone_Final ;


IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#T_Unique_ByEmail_Final') IS NOT NULL
   DROP TABLE #T_Unique_ByEmail_Final;
	
Select * , Dense_rank() over(order by MasterID_ByEmail ) +@Rownumber as MasterID 
into #T_Unique_ByEmail_Final 
from #T_Unique_ByEmail ;




Select @Rownumber= Isnull(max(MasterID),(Select max(MasterID) from #T_Unique_ByPhone_Final)
						 )
 from #T_Unique_ByEmail_Final ;



IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#T_3_Final') IS NOT NULL
   DROP TABLE #T_3_Final;
	
Select * , Dense_rank() over(order by MasterID_ByZip ) +@Rownumber as MasterID 
into #T_3_Final 
from #T_3 ;

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------





IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#T_Final') IS NOT NULL
   DROP TABLE #T_Final;


Select * into #T_Final from  
(

		Select  *, 'Phone' as Type from #T_Unique_ByPhone_Final
		
		Union all
		
		Select  * ,'Email' as Type  from #T_Unique_ByEmail_Final 
		
		Union all
		
		Select  * ,'Zip' as Type  from #T_3_Final 
)a1 ;

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------






Update EDW.Dim_customer Set MasterID=NULL where 1=1;
Update EDW.Dim_customer set MasterID =t2.masterID
from EDW.Dim_customer t1 join 
						(Select CustomerID, Concat('GID-',dense_rank() over(Order by MasterID )) as MasterID from #T_Final) t2
						on t1.customerID=t2.CustomerID
						Where t1.MasterID is null ;

source.sqlReaderQuery:
--************************ Customer ID ******************************


SELECT  * FROM 
(
	SELECT
	CONCAT('FHI-',Id)			AS NotesID	,
	RecType	,
	CAST(NULL	AS NVARCHAR(100))	AS JobID,
	CONCAT('FHI-',RecID)		AS CustomerID	,
	CONCAT('FHI-',EnteredBy)	AS EnteredBy_EmployeeID	,
	EnteredOn	,
	CONCAT('FHI-',UpdatedBy)	AS UpdatedBy_EmployeeID	,
	UpdatedOn	,
	notes	,
	important	,
	CONCAT('FHI-',nct_id) 		AS NotesCategoryID,
	nct_Desc					AS NotesCategoryDesc,
	
	NULL			AS [LP_JobID]					,
	RecID			AS [LP_CustomerID]				,
	EnteredBy		AS [LP_EnteredBy_EmployeeID]	,
	UpdatedBy		AS [LP_UpdatedBy_EmployeeID]	,
	nct_id			AS LP_NotesCategoryID			,
	'FHI'			AS [Division]										,
	GETDATE()		AS LastUpdateTS,
	ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY RecID ORDER BY  COALESCE(EnteredOn,'1900-01-01') DESC ) AS RW
	
	FROM [ZML].[LP_FHI_not_Notes] WHERE RecType='cst'

	) M1
WHERE RW=1
